flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Iowa Central Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Iowa Central Community College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (32.9% → 40.9%).
